E-Vive is East Africa's pioneering digital nutrition and care support platform for cancer patients, survivors, and their caregivers — founded on lived experience, clinical expertise, and compassion.

Salome Ruguru Mburu
Founder & Director, CNA · Wellness Advisor
Salome combines clinical nursing assistance, 15+ years of entrepreneurship, and the deeply personal experience of caring for her late father through stage 4 cancer to build E-Vive — a service she wished existed when she needed it most.
🩺

Our Story

Born from the bedside of a father,
built for every family like ours

In 2020, Salome's father was diagnosed with stage 4 throat cancer. For months, she was his primary caregiver — navigating treatment protocols, managing pain, and desperately searching for guidance on nutrition that could support his recovery and comfort.

“I searched everywhere for practical, culturally relevant nutritional guidance for cancer patients in Kenya. I found almost nothing. That gap became E-Vive.”

The result of that journey was E-Vive Wellness Initiative, founded in January 2025. Informed by clinical training, extensive research, and lived experience, E-Vive is now expanding into a fully integrated digital care platform — matching the nutritional and care placement expertise of its Star Delight sister brand with cutting-edge technology.

E-Vive is also powered by insights from Star Delight Care — the founder's broader healthcare and care-personnel placement venture — creating an ecosystem where nutritional care, direct home care, and digital health converge.

Empathy
Integrity
Compassion
Excellence
Hope
Clinical Rigour
What We Offer

Holistic Care Services

Six integrated service pillars spanning clinical nutrition, direct care, caregiver support, education, and digital health — all under one compassionate roof.

🥗
01
Personalised Nutrition Plans
Evidence-based, cancer-specific meal plans designed around your treatment phase, taste tolerance, and cultural food preferences. Updated dynamically as your health progresses.
OncologyPalliativeDietetics
🩺
02
Advisory Consultations
One-on-one sessions with Salome — CNA, wellness advisor and founder — integrating clinical assessment, nutritional analysis, and compassionate guidance.
ClinicalTelehealth1-on-1
🏠
03
Home Visit & Meal Prep Training
Expert home visits for hands-on meal preparation coaching tailored to the patient's needs, empowering families to sustain quality nutrition at home.
Home CareHands-On
💙
04
Caregiver Support Programme
Structured emotional support, burnout prevention coaching, and practical care coordination guidance for family caregivers — who are too often overlooked.
Mental HealthBurnoutFamily
📚
05
Nutrition Education & Awareness
Group workshops, community seminars, and digital content educating patients, families, and healthcare workers on nutrition's vital role in cancer recovery.
EducationCommunity
🌐
06
Digital Care Platform
Access care plans, book consultations, track nutritional progress, connect with the caregiver community — all through the secure E-Vive digital portal.
PlatformDigital24/7

Active
Digital Platform

Your care, in your hands — everywhere

The E-Vive Portal is a purpose-built digital health ecosystem that connects patients, caregivers, and advisors in real time. Accessible via web and mobile, it extends our care beyond the consultation room into everyday life.

📊

Live Nutrition Tracking

Daily food logging with cancer-specific nutrient analysis, trend charts, and personalized alerts reviewed by your advisor.

📅

Smart Appointment System

Book, reschedule, and attend consultations — including video calls — directly from the platform.

🔔

Caregiver Alerts

Family members receive real-time care plan updates, medication reminders, and appointment notifications.

🌍

Diaspora Care Module

Kenyan families abroad commission and monitor loved ones' care plans, with full English reporting and FX billing.

Get Started

Begin Your Nutritional
Care Journey Today

Your first step toward better quality of life through evidence-based, personalised nutrition. Every journey starts with a single conversation — and we are here to listen.

🫀

Treatment Readiness

Optimal nutritional status before and during chemotherapy, radiotherapy, and surgery to support treatment efficacy and tolerance.

🌿

Healing & Recovery

Anti-inflammatory, immune-supportive meal plans promoting tissue repair, weight maintenance, and energy restoration post-treatment.

🧘🏾

Quality of Life

Addressing appetite loss, nausea, swallowing difficulties, and fatigue through compassionate, patient-centred nutritional strategies.

Request a Consultation
Complete this form and we'll reach out within 24 hours to confirm your session.
Subscription Plans

Care that fits your life

Flexible, transparent plans designed for patients, caregivers, survivors and diaspora families. All prices in Kenyan Shillings.

Starter
Companion
KES2,500/month
  • ✓Platform access & care plan viewing
  • ✓1 group nutrition workshop/month
  • ✓Weekly meal planning templates
  • ✓Community forum access
  • ✓WhatsApp support (business hours)
MOST LOVED
Core
Guardian
KES6,500/month
  • ✓Everything in Companion
  • ✓2 advisory consultations/month
  • ✓Personalised nutrition plan (dynamic)
  • ✓Caregiver support sessions (x2)
  • ✓Priority appointment booking
  • ✓Home visit (1x/quarter)
Premium
Luminary
KES14,000/month
  • ✓Everything in Guardian
  • ✓Weekly consultations (unlimited)
  • ✓Dedicated care coordinator
  • ✓Telemedicine specialist access
  • ✓Family nutritional coaching
  • ✓Full clinical documentation & reporting
★★★★★
“When my mother was diagnosed, I felt completely lost. E-Vive gave us a practical roadmap — the personalised meal plans made a measurable difference in how she tolerated her chemotherapy.”
👩🏾
Grace M.
Caregiver, Nairobi
★★★★★
“Salome's understanding comes from lived experience. She doesn't just advise — she truly gets what we're going through. The support sessions have been life-changing for me as a caregiver.”
👨🏾
James K.
Caregiver, Mombasa
★★★★★
“The digital platform made tracking my nutrition so easy. I can show my oncologist the data and we now make decisions together. I feel in control for the first time.”
👩🏿
Ruth N.
Cancer Survivor, Nakuru
Community & Impact

You are not facing this alone

E-Vive is more than a service — it is a community of patients, survivors, and caregivers walking this journey together. Our forum, support groups, and shared resources remind everyone that connection is as healing as nutrition.

first step?

Whether you're a patient beginning treatment, a caregiver seeking support, or a diaspora family looking for trusted home care — E-Vive is here for you.
